summary: Parallel review: FAIL (2 critical, 19 warning, 10 suggestion). Compound gate: PASS

findingsList.text: 🟡 bin/lib/outer-loop.mjs:1 — `--no-simplify` flag not forwarded to inner loop invocation; SPEC requires passthrough but outer-loop has zero references to this flag
🟡 bin/lib/simplify-pass.mjs:188 — `simplifyPass` in STATE.json omits `tokens` field from spec; tokens tracked in `tokenUsage.byPhase.simplify` instead (divergent but functional)
🟡 test/simplify-pass.test.mjs:323 — `--no-simplify` test simulates run.mjs logic inline rather than testing actual code path; refactors to run.mjs could silently break the flag
🟡 bin/lib/simplify-pass.mjs:26 — `getFeatureDiff` hardcodes `"main"` with no `master` fallback; repos using `master` silently skip the pass. Add fallback.
🟡 bin/lib/simplify-pass.mjs:166 — Silent `catch { break; }` on re-verify dispatch failure, but fix dispatch at L148-150 logs the error. Add matching diagnostic log.
🟡 test/simplify-pass.test.mjs:4 — Dead `mock` import from `node:test`; never called (only in comment at L305). Remove it. (Corroborates task-8 simplicity eval finding.)
🟡 test/simplify-pass.test.mjs:298 — "fails open when role file is missing" doesn't exercise the error path; tests happy path instead. Inject a mock for real coverage.
🟡 test/simplify-pass.test.mjs:323 — "--no-simplify flag" test re-implements the `run.mjs:1507` guard inline; would pass even if production code changes. Replace with integration test.
🟡 tasks/task-2/handshake.json:7 — Handshake claims "601 tests pass" but artifact shows 590 (588 pass, 2 skip). Count inflated; zero-fail claim accurate. Backlog item.
🟡 test/simplify-pass.test.mjs:323 — `--no-simplify` test mirrors guard logic inline instead of exercising production code. Carried from prior reviews; not introduced by this task.

🔴 `test/simplify-pass.test.mjs:33` — `getFeatureDiff` test mock accepts any args; doesn't verify merge-base is called with `"main"` or diff uses `${mergeBase}..HEAD`. The task's core claim ("full branch diff, not per-task") has zero argument-level test coverage. A per-task diff regression would pass all tests. Add argument assertions or use a spy.

🟡 `.team/.../tasks/task-4/artifacts/test-output.txt` — Stale gate artifact. References functions (`isCodeFile`, `getChangedFiles`, `runSimplifyFixLoop`) that don't exist in current code. Gate ran against a pre-rewrite version (commit `e8ddd24`, orphaned during rebase). Re-run gate against current code.
🟡 `test/simplify-pass.test.mjs` — "Full branch diff (not per-task)" test suite (3 tests in commit `e8ddd24`) was lost during rewrite in `b296d3f`. Restore equivalent coverage.
🟡 `bin/lib/simplify-pass.mjs:26` — No `master` fallback. Repos not using `main` silently skip the pass. SPEC says "(or the feature branch base)".
🟡 `test/simplify-pass.test.mjs:163` — Fix-loop test uses static mock; can't distinguish "re-verified with fresh diff" from "re-used stale diff".
🟡 bin/lib/simplify-pass.mjs:115 — Fail-open on dispatch failure writes no persistent audit record; write a "dispatch failed — gate bypassed" entry to simplify-eval.md before returning
🟡 bin/lib/simplify-pass.mjs:181 — Empty `catch {}` silently discards eval file write errors; log `err.message` before swallowing
🟡 bin/lib/simplify-pass.mjs:198 — Empty `catch {}` silently discards STATE.json write errors; log `err.message` before swallowing
🔴 `test/simplify-pass.test.mjs:4` — Dead import: `mock` is imported from `node:test` but never called. Remove `, mock` from the import.

🟡 `test/simplify-pass.test.mjs:298` — Misleading test name: "fails open when role file is missing" doesn't test the missing-file path — it tests the happy path since `roles/simplicity.md` exists in the repo. Rename or inject the role path to actually test the scenario.

🟡 `test/simplify-pass.test.mjs:323` — Test duplicates run.mjs logic inline (`if (agent && completed > 0 && !args.includes("--no-simplify"))`) instead of testing the actual code. If someone changes the condition in run.mjs, this test still passes.
